page_metadata.biotools__summary: A  somatic deletion caller designed for whole-genome sequencing data from unmatched samples. SoloDel is specialized for identifying somatic deletions with frequently existing sampling issues : low mutational frequency in cell population and absence of the matched control samples.

SoloDel is specialized for identifying somatic deletions with frequently existing sampling issues : low mutational frequency in cell population and absence of the matched control samples.
